hero.title: Course Tracker
hero.description: Organize courses, monitor assignments, and keep learning progress visible.

differences.title: Keep every course moving
differences.description: Bring course progress and upcoming work into one focused view.

items.title: Course overview
items.description: See active courses and their current progress clearly.

items.title: Assignment focus
items.description: Keep upcoming tasks and deadlines easy to review.

items.title: Completion visibility
items.description: Understand what is finished and what needs attention next.

feel.title: A clear view of your learning workload
feel.description: Course Tracker reduces the effort needed to stay organized across multiple courses.

items.title: Review progress
items.description: See completed work and the next useful action.

audiences.title: Who uses Course Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for learners managing structured courses and assignments.

items.title: Students
items.description: Manage classes, assignments, and course progress.

resourceSection.title: Course tracking essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep the information needed to move each course forward.

items.title: Course records
items.description: Maintain a clear list of active learning commitments.

groupedSection.title: Organize the learning journey
groupedSection.description: Group course information around planning and progress.

items.name: Assignments
items.description: Track required work and due dates.

items.name: Milestones
items.description: Mark important stages in each course.

items.name: Completion
items.description: See how much of each course is finished.

technicalSection.title: Built for reusable course records
technicalSection.description: Course Tracker follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize your courses?
finalCta.description: Open Course Tracker and add the course you want to move forward.
